requirement_topic.en: ERC Rooftop PV Regulation and Inverter-Capacity Changes
requirement_topic.zh: ERC 屋顶光伏监管与逆变器容量变更
requirement_topic.zht: ERC 屋頂光伏監管與逆變器容量變更

summary.en: Thailand's Energy Regulatory Commission regulates electricity industry licensing and related notices. ERC has published notices concerning changes to installed solar-panel capacity and inverter capacity for licensed solar electricity producers selling electricity into utility networks. For rooftop or distributed PV projects, inverter model, AC capacity, export behavior, and later equipment changes may need to match the approved project, licence, PPA, or utility file.
summary.zh: 泰国能源监管委员会（ERC）监管电力行业许可及相关公告。ERC 已发布关于向公用事业网络售电的太阳能发电许可持有人变更太阳能板装机容量和逆变器容量的公告。对于屋顶或分布式光伏项目，逆变器型号、交流容量、反送行为以及后续设备变更可能需要与已批准的项目、许可、购电协议或公用事业文件一致。
summary.zht: 泰國能源監管委員會（ERC）監管電力行業許可及相關公告。ERC 已發布關於向公用事業網路售電的太陽能發電許可持有人變更太陽能板裝機容量和逆變器容量的公告。對於屋頂或分散式光伏專案，逆變器型號、交流容量、反送行為以及後續設備變更可能需要與已批准的專案、許可、購電協議或公用事業文件一致。

standards_or_laws: ERC notices for solar electricity producers and inverter-capacity changes
Project licence, PPA, and utility approval conditions

summary.en: China factory certificates, GB/T 37408 type-test documents, and GB/T 19964 grid-connection evidence do not determine Thai ERC licence status, approved AC capacity, PPA terms, or whether an inverter substitution is acceptable after approval.
summary.zh: 中国工厂证书、GB/T 37408 型式试验文件和 GB/T 19964 并网证据不能决定泰国 ERC 许可状态、已批准交流容量、购电协议条款或获批后逆变器替换是否可接受。
summary.zht: 中國工廠證書、GB/T 37408 型式試驗文件和 GB/T 19964 併網證據不能決定泰國 ERC 許可狀態、已批准交流容量、購電協議條款或獲批後逆變器替換是否可接受。

gap.en: The gap is administrative traceability. Exporters should provide exact model, serial-number range, AC and DC ratings, firmware version, derating options, datasheets, and substitution-impact notes so the Thai developer can maintain the project approval file when equipment is changed.
gap.zh: 差距在行政可追溯性。出口商应提供准确型号、序列号范围、交流和直流额定值、固件版本、降额选项、数据表和替换影响说明，以便泰国开发商在设备变更时维护项目批准文件。
gap.zht: 差距在行政可追溯性。出口商應提供準確型號、序列號範圍、交流和直流額定值、韌體版本、降額選項、資料表和替換影響說明，以便泰國開發商在設備變更時維護專案批准文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where ERC licensing, PPA, or utility approval conditions apply; not a general standalone product certificate for every inverter sale
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China documents do not determine Thai ERC licence or project-file status

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep inverter capacity and model data aligned with the Thai ERC, PPA, and utility file; do not treat a China model-family certificate as approval for a Thai project change.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应使逆变器容量和型号资料与泰国 ERC、购电协议及公用事业文件一致；不要将中国型号族证书视为泰国项目变更批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應使逆變器容量和型號資料與泰國 ERC、購電協議及公用事業文件一致；不要將中國型號族證書視為泰國專案變更批准。
